_comment: Copy this file to config.json and fill in your values. config.json is gitignored and will never be committed.

lm_studio._model_note: Check LM Studio > Local Server tab for the exact model name string. Recommended: qwen2.5-3b-instruct (best for classification, ~2GB RAM). Alternatives: qwen3-4b-instruct, phi-3.5-mini, llama-3.2-3b-instruct, smollm3-3b

telegram._help: Bot token from @BotFather. Chat ID from @userinfobot.
